overview.description: The Unlimited HFGM Global Macro ETF (HFGM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks capital appreciation by outperforming the hedge fund industry's Global Macro sector by creating a similar portfolio with 2x more volatility. The fund uses futures contracts and, to a lesser extent, swaps to manage volatility. HFGM was launched on Apr 14, 2025 and is issued by Unlimited.
